ddl.value: "scope" = 'team' and "userId" is null and "organizationId" is not null
ddl.name: billing_credit_usage_event_target_check

ddl.value:
(
        ("kind" = 'verification_code' and "encryptedCode" is not null and "deliveryStatus" is null)
        or
        ("kind" = 'delivery' and "encryptedCode" is null and "deliveryStatus" is not null)
        or
        ("kind" not in ('delivery', 'verification_code') and "encryptedCode" is null and "deliveryStatus" is null)
      )
ddl.name: gmail_useful_detail_payload_check

ddl.value:
(
        ("provider" = 'gmail' and "ownerUserId" is not null)
        or
        ("provider" = 'managed' and "ownerUserId" is null and "organizationId" is not null)
      )
ddl.name: mailbox_provider_ownership_check
